description_long: This is a freestanding promotional kiosk with a triangular prism shape, constructed from lightweight, rigid panels. The exterior is covered in vibrant printed graphics, predominantly green and blue, advertising a campaign called 'la temporada verde' by INGENIA. The front and side panels feature bold text, logos, and images, including a welcoming message and a photo of a smiling couple. The rear panel lists combo offers and details in a structured, easy-to-read format. The kiosk is designed for visibility and information dissemination in public urban spaces, with no windows or doors, and a simple peaked roof. Its structure is likely hollow, making it portable and easy to reposition.
description: A triangular, freestanding promotional kiosk with colorful printed graphics, campaign text, and a peaked roof, designed for public information display.
description_view_0: The front panel displays the 'la temporada verde' campaign logo and welcoming text on a green leafy background.
description_view_1: The rear panel lists combo offers and campaign details in a structured format with green and blue highlights.
description_view_2: The side panel features the campaign logo, a photo of a smiling couple, and additional promotional text.
description_view_3: An angled view showing both the front and side panels, highlighting the continuous printed graphics and the kiosk's triangular shape.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign; full-panel printed graphics with campaign logos, text, and images on all three exterior faces.
attribute_roof_design: Peaked (triangular prism) roof, made of the same printed panel material, no overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist promotional style with bold graphics and simple geometric form.
